# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Uploads
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UFU_User_File_Uploads {
    private static $instance = null;
    private $upload_subdir = 'user-files';

    public static function instance() {
        if (self::$instance === null) {
            self::$instance = new self();
        }
        return self::$instance;
    }

    private function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'shortcode'));
        add_action('admin_post_ufu_upload_file', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_ufu_upload_file', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
    }

    public function activate() {
        $this->ensure_upload_dir();
    }

    private function ensure_upload_dir() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        $target_dir = trailingslashit($uploads['basedir']) . $this->upload_subdir;

        if (!file_exists($target_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($target_dir);
        }

        if (!file_exists($target_dir . '/index.php')) {
            @file_put_contents($target_dir . '/index.php', "<?php\n// Silence is golden.\n");
        }

        if (!file_exists($target_dir . '/.htaccess')) {
            @file_put_contents($target_dir . '/.htaccess', "Options -Indexes\n<FilesMatch \"\\.(php|phtml|php3|php4|php5|phar)$\">\n  Deny from all\n</FilesMatch>\n");
        }

        return $target_dir;
    }

    public function shortcode($atts = array()) {
        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'show_message' => '1',
        ), $atts, 'user_file_upload');

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['ufu_message']) && $atts['show_message'] === '1') {
            $message_text = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_message']));
            $message = '<div class="ufu-message">' . esc_html($message_text) . '</div>';
        }

        $action_url = esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php'));
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $nonce = wp_create_nonce('ufu_upload_file_' . $user_id);

        $html  = $message;
        $html .= '<form method="post" action="' . $action_url . '" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $html .= '<input type="hidden" name="action" value="ufu_upload_file" />';
        $html .= '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_nonce" value="' . esc_attr($nonce) . '" />';
        $html .= '<p><label for="ufu_file">Select file:</label><br />';
        $html .= '<input type="file" name="ufu_file" id="ufu_file" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.txt" required /></p>';
        $html .= '<p><label for="ufu_file_label">File label (optional):</label><br />';
        $html .= '<input type="text" name="ufu_file_label" id="ufu_file_label" /></p>';
        $html .= '<p><button type="submit">Upload File</button></p>';
        $html .= '</form>';

        return $html;
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('You must be logged in to upload files.');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_nonce'])), 'ufu_upload_file_' . $user_id)) {
            wp_die('Invalid security token.');
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufu_file']) || empty($_FILES['ufu_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('No file selected.');
        }

        $file = $_FILES['ufu_file'];

        if (!empty($file['error']) && $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Upload failed with error code ' . intval($file['error']) . '.');
        }

        $allowed_mimes = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'          => 'application/msword',
            'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'txt'          => 'text/plain',
        );

        $filetype = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name'], $allowed_mimes);

        if (empty($filetype['ext']) || empty($filetype['type'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Invalid file type. Allowed: images, PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT.');
        }

        $mime_type = $filetype['type'];
        $ext = $filetype['ext'];

        if (!$this->is_allowed_mime($mime_type, $allowed_mimes)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('File type not permitted.');
        }

        $target_dir = $this->ensure_upload_dir();

        $original_name = sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($file['name']));
        $file_name = wp_unique_filename($target_dir, $original_name);

        $destination = trailingslashit($target_dir) . $file_name;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('Could not save uploaded file.');
        }

        @chmod($destination, 0644);

        $attachment_url = trailingslashit(trailingslashit(wp_upload_dir()['baseurl']) . $this->upload_subdir) . $file_name;

        $file_label = '';
        if (isset($_POST['ufu_file_label'])) {
            $file_label = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_file_label']));
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_file_' . md5($file_name), array(
            'file_name' => $file_name,
            'file_label' => $file_label,
            'file_path'  => $destination,
            'file_url'   => $attachment_url,
            'mime_type'  => $mime_type,
            'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        ));

        $this->redirect_with_message('File uploaded successfully.');
    }

    private function is_allowed_mime($mime_type, $allowed_mimes) {
        return in_array($mime_type, $allowed_mimes, true);
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($message) {
        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }
        $redirect = add_query_arg('ufu_message', rawurlencode($message), $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }
}

UFU_User_File_Uploads::instance();
